text.title: Outcome Based Roadmaps Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Outcome Based Roadmaps.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS sets Q2 outcome 'Reduce churn from 8% to 5% by EOQ2'; baseline 8% from churn dashboard; kill signal 'churn>9% by week 6'; candidates: onboarding rewrite, weekly digest, churn-survey wedge; not-doing: dark mode, native mobile.
